visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins in a Costco supermarket aisle. A woman with long dark hair, wearing a black mesh-style top, is seen from behind and the side, looking at a refrigerated shelf filled with packaged meat products. She points towards a specific package of ginger duck soup meat. (2) The camera moves closer to show detailed packs of raw duck meat and soup base within a clear plastic container. The woman's hand reaches in to pick up a package, highlighting the price tag of $569 and the product name labels. (3) A quick cut shows the camera panning across adjacent shelf spaces featuring other duck products like legs and breasts. Other shoppers are seen blurred in the background, moving through the wide aisles. (4) The scene transitions to an indoor home setting where the woman in black is joined by another woman wearing a white lace-trimmed top and a black Kangol beret. They sit together behind a table, holding the ginger duck product package towards the camera. (5) The two women are shown eating the cooked ginger duck soup from a black pot. They use pink chopsticks and spoons. Their facial expressions are very animated and joyful as they taste the food. They gesture enthusiastically with their hands while describing the texture and flavor.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: Costco Wholesale. [Variety]: 討論度爆高! 薑母鴨只要569元. [Subtitle]: 廚娘請問這個薑母鴨可以嗎?. (2) [Variety]: 沒吃過薑母鴨. [Subtitle]: 我其實沒吃過薑母鴨. (3) [Variety]: 好市多的薑母鴨肉品組合. [Subtitle]: 那我們來試試看好市多的薑母鴨肉品組合. (4) [Variety]: 569元如何. [Subtitle]: 569元如何?. (5) [Variety]: 薑母鴨初體驗. [Subtitle]: 薑母鴨初體驗. (6) [Subtitle]: 哇哦, 每一個都569元哎, 還蠻誠意的. 而且其實銷量蠻多的. (7) [Subtitle]: 你可以在旁邊加購鴨腿. (8) [Subtitle]: 哦對, 吃不夠旁邊有鴨腿跟鴨胸. 然後這是妹妹很愛買的鴨胸. 這個好吃. [Variety]: 鴨腿跟鴨胸. (9) [Subtitle]: 好市多出的薑母鴨肉品組合. [Variety]: 薑母鴨肉品組合. (10) [Subtitle]: 然後這裡啊有4隻大腿, 還有鴨胗鴨腸等等. 看討論度非常的高, 我們來看看好不好吃. [Variety]: 有4隻大腿. 還有鴨胗鴨腸等等... 好不好吃. [Logo]: go. (11) [Variety]: 薑母鴨肉片組合 $569元. [Subtitle]: 薑母鴨肉片組合 $569元. (12) [Variety]: 1-10分我給 100分. [Subtitle]: 1-10分我給100分!. (13) [Variety]: 超過10分. [Subtitle]: 超過10分, 這個完全就是好市多必買系列. (14) [Variety]: 黑馬. [Subtitle]: 黑馬, 真的好好吃哦. 必推他的薑母鴨. (15) [Variety]: 湯頭非常的有層次. [Subtitle]: 湯頭非常的有層次, 他的那個鴨感覺是有燉出那個精華在裡面的. (16) [Variety]: 肉. [Subtitle]: 對, 而且他肉給的超多. [Variety]: 肉給的超多. (17) [Subtitle]: 他除了湯底本身的幾塊鴨肉以外, 還有另外給你4隻鴨腿. (18) [Subtitle]: 他裡面沒有加任何火鍋料, 就只有鴨的肉, 鴨肉、鴨腿、鴨腸、鴨胗. [Variety]: 鴨肉、鴨腿、鴨腸、鴨胗. (19) [Subtitle]: 非常的誠意. 而且食材處理超好, 鴨胗鴨腸全部都是切好, 你直接下去涮, 涮起來吃, 超好吃. (20) [Subtitle]: 食材吃的出來是非常新鮮的, 口感很脆, 然後它的鴨肉是Q彈的. (21) [Subtitle]: 這整個麻油爆薑片的味道都超棒, 喝一下子就全身暖起來了. 這個價格實在是太便宜, 太值得買了. 推薦給你們.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main creators, approximately 6 blurred shoppers in background
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman with long dark hair in a black mesh top; another with dark hair in a white top and a black Kangol beret.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A Costco warehouse supermarket with high ceilings and refrigerated displays; a home living room with a couch and neutral walls.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with the ambient hum of a supermarket and a female voice asking about the ginger duck product. An upbeat, medium-tempo electronic BGM is present in the background. A 'ding' sound effect emphasizes the first price display. (2) As the camera focuses on the meat packs, the narration becomes more informative. Short 'whoosh' sound effects accompany the quick visual cuts between different packages. The voice is friendly and has a clear, energetic pitch. (3) Upon transitioning to the indoor review scene, the vocal presence becomes dual-tracked as two women converse excitedly. The BGM remains consistent in tempo. High-arousal vocal inflections occur as they express surprise and delight. (4) During the tasting segment, sound effects like 'sparkle' or 'pop' sounds are layered over the speech to highlight key review points. The voices maintain a high volume and rapid speech rate, indicating strong positive valence and enthusiasm.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as an enthusiastic review of a Costco ginger duck meat set. It uses a location-based hook to show price and contents, followed by an at-home tasting review to validate the product quality and encourage purchase.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display of the brand name and positive review of a specific product.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses typical social media editing patterns with high text density and bright colors to maintain viewer engagement during a product review.
